asset_name: BPC-157 Tendon Cell Migration and Outgrowth Mechanistic Evidence
status: PRIMARY PUBLICATION IDENTIFIED — DIRECT EXTRACTION PENDING

study.publication_title: The promoting effect of pentadecapeptide BPC 157 on tendon healing involves tendon outgrowth, cell survival, and cell migration

evidence_summary: The publication identity supports mechanistic investigation of tendon outgrowth, cell survival and migration.
limitations: Mechanistic preclinical evidence cannot be translated directly into a clinical healing claim.
